name: dailyCloseReport
_note: LENS_ACTIONS handler (path-3; NOT assassin-enumerated). The page drives this via the artifact-bound /:id/run path; this override exercises the /api/lens/run peel shape. Reads artifact.data.appointments + artifact.data.productsSold + params.date. RETURNS {date,totalAppointments,completedCount,noShowCount,cancelledCount,serviceRevenue,productsSold,productRevenue,totalRevenue,byProvider:[{provider,appointments,revenue}]} — the EXACT keys EndOfDayClose renders. POISON: price/amount via finiteNum (parseFloat+Number.isFinite) so 'Infinity'/'NaN' collapse to 0; all money fields stay finite. try/catch wrapped. Pinned by server/tests/services-lens-macros.test.js.
